text: Migrate every route and file from the Pages Router to the Next.js App Router. When finished, remove the pages dir entirely. Ensure the proper App Router APIs are used. If a Pages Router API was used that no longer exists in App Router, replace it with the newer version or the new pattern. Make sure to add types.

I’m mapping the Next.js structure first so I can convert the routing surface cleanly and avoid leaving any Pages Router-only APIs behind. Next I’ll identify every `pages/` route, its data-fetching and API usage, then replace them with App Router equivalents and remove `pages/` once the migration is complete.

text: The build surfaced one concrete App Router change in this Next version: `headers()` is async here, so the home page needs to await it. I’m fixing that and then rerunning the build; after that I’ll verify the generated tsconfig change and remove any leftover `pages` references if needed.
The only failed check was that async `headers()` call. I’m rebuilding now to confirm the App Router tree is type-correct end to end before I do the final cleanup pass.

text: One small cleanup remains: I want to make sure the old `pages/` directory is physically gone, not just empty after file deletions. I’m removing any leftover empty folders now and then I’ll give you the exact migration summary.

Migrated the app fully to the App Router and removed `pages/` entirely.

What changed:
- Replaced `_app`, `_document`, and `_error` with App Router equivalents in:
  - [app/layout.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx)
  - [app/providers.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/providers.tsx)
  - [app/error.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/error.tsx)
  - [app/not-found.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/not-found.tsx)
- Moved the routes to App Router pages:
  - [app/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx)
  - [app/blog/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/page.tsx)
  - [app/blog/[id]/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx)
- Converted API routes to route handlers:
  - [app/api/posts/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/route.ts)
  - [app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts)
- Added explicit types in:
  - [app/types.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/types.ts)
- Updated styling for App Router navigation links in:
  - [styles/globals.css](/home/user/workspace/styles/globals.css)

Notes:
- `getServerSideProps`, `getStaticProps`, `getStaticPaths`, `next/router`, and `next/head` were replaced with App Router patterns:
  - `metadata` / `generateMetadata`
  - `generateStaticParams`
  - `notFound()`
  - `next/navigation`
  - route handlers in `app/api`
- `tsconfig.json` was updated by Next to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts`.

Verification:
- `npm run build` passes successfully.

If you want, I can also do a second pass to simplify the now-duplicated blog/content typings or add test coverage for the route handlers.
